trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The order #000000630 shows Order Status = Complete, Item Status = Shipped with Qty Shipped = 1, Grand Total = $135.58, Total Paid = $135.58, and Total Refunded = $0.00. The Comments History section contains no staff notes, delivery confirmations, tracking numbers, or customer communication entries.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View page → Items Ordered section (shipment details) and Comments History tab at http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/630#comments.
WHY IT MATTERS: Although the system indicates the item was shipped and fully paid, there is no evidence in Comments History confirming delivery (e.g., tracking or carrier confirmation). Without documented proof of delivery or prior investigation notes, the refund cannot be approved or denied outright and requires escalation for shipment verification with the carrier.
